creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


You're using a version of FreeBSD that is past EOL (although admittedly 
it EOL'd yesterday) and an older version of portmaster than what is in 
the ports tree. I added a test for this problem in version 2.16, and we 
are up to version 2.17 already. 

There is no way to solve this problem for older versions of FreeBSD since 
the required functionality (not just the long options) does not, and will 
not exist. 

I recommend that you update FreeBSD at minimum to 6.4-RELEASE, and you'd 
be better off with 6-stable, and better still with 8-stable. 

Regards, 

Doug
